# IPTV Providers UK

> UK-focused IPTV subscription service with editorial buyer guides.

## Key resources

- [About](https://iptv-providers-uk.com/about): publisher and editorial team
- [Editorial policy](https://iptv-providers-uk.com/editorial-policy): sourcing, review process, corrections
- [Blog](https://iptv-providers-uk.com/blog): buyer guides
- [Setup guides](https://iptv-providers-uk.com/tutorials): 11 device tutorials — Fire Stick, Samsung and LG Smart TV, Apple TV, Android, iPhone, Windows, Mac, Formuler, BuzzTV
- [Pricing](https://iptv-providers-uk.com/#pricing): current plans
- [Contact](https://iptv-providers-uk.com/contact): support and enquiries

## Operational facts

- Sales and activation handled via WhatsApp on +44 7878 757831
- 30-day money-back guarantee
- British English editorial
- Editorial byline: IPTV Providers UK Editorial
